text: Living a healthy life involves caring for your body and mind. A balanced diet means eating plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains while limiting sugary snacks. Regular exercise, such as walking or cycling for thirty minutes daily, strengthens your heart and muscles. Sleep is also vital: most adults need seven to nine hours each night to feel rested and focused. Mental health matters too. Taking breaks from work, practicing mindfulness, or simply talking with friends can reduce stress. Finding a good work-life balance—where you have time for duties and hobbies—helps you stay happier and more productive. When you combine these habits, you build a foundation for long-term wellbeing.
